reasoning: Today's workout focuses on lactate clearance and aerobic base. Your last ride showed a lower intensity, so let's intensify with intervals designed to improve fatigue resistance. Emigration Canyon's terrain will simulate the demands of the Alpine Loop climb, helping prepare for sustained efforts.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Alternate every 4 minutes between 209-223W and 242-256W, mimicking over-under demands.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
